variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown. The visible D&A lines appear as separate broader operating-expense items, not tied to the selected COGS row 'External projects costs'. Conservative no-add to avoid misallocating non-COGS D&A.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A summary line above operating profit. It sits alongside, not within, the selected XSGA component rows ('Salaries and personnel cost', 'Other Operating Expenses', 'Selling and Marketing'), so it should be added separately. Prefer the summary row over its components to avoid double counting.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket is built from operating overhead components and does not already contain the explicit separate D&A line. Because a same-level D&A summary row is present above operating profit, it should be added separately. Summary row preferred over components.
